message:
feat(wa-core): improve ingestion, storage, and wezterm integration

Enhance core modules:
- ingest.rs: Better pane data ingestion
- ipc.rs: IPC improvements
- runtime.rs: Runtime initialization enhancements
- storage.rs: Storage layer improvements
- tailer.rs: Tailer refinements
- wezterm.rs: Enhanced WezTerm integration
- main.rs: CLI adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
